description: CompositionPink printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, deep V-neck with a purple piping extending to the short chest buttoned placket, has pintucks along the piping, and a split side hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this white printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this V-neck kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
